name: Local Solar System
description: Starter tutorial sky: Sun, Moon, planets, and local surveys. Teaches naked-eye and ground optical observation.
teaching_summary: Local solar system tutorial sky: survey bright planets and moons before deep-field campaigns.
scale_description: Distances stored as Mpc (AU × conversion); Godot uses a log-radial layout.
generate_command: uv run universe game generate-scene --scene solar-system
legacy_generate_command: uv run universe generate solar-system --seed local-sky --out data/generated/solar-system

name: The Lyman-alpha Furnace
description: High-redshift protocluster deep field (z ≈ 3.1): galaxies, LAB, quasars, compact objects, cosmic web, and speculative endgame targets.
teaching_summary: Deep-field protocluster: use signal modes to stress different physics (radio jets, X-ray accretion, weak lensing structure).
scale_description: Comoving positions in Mpc; normalize by scene size_mpc for navigation.
generate_command: uv run universe game generate-scene --scene scene-001
legacy_generate_command: uv run universe generate scene-001 --seed lyman-alpha-furnace --out data/generated/scene-001

name: Radio CMB Survey
description: Radio/microwave sky: CMB shell, radio-loud galaxies, jet quasars, and compact pulsars.
teaching_summary: Radio and microwave instruments reveal the cold CMB background and energetic jets invisible in ordinary light.
generate_command: uv run universe game generate-scene --scene radio-cmb-survey
legacy_generate_command: uv run universe generate radio-cmb-survey --seed radio-first-light --out data/generated/radio-cmb-survey

name: Stellar Remnant Field
description: High-energy compact sources: magnetars, black-hole candidates, and accretion-powered quasars.
teaching_summary: High-energy astronomy reveals compact remnants and accretion violence.
generate_command: uv run universe game generate-scene --scene stellar-remnant-field
legacy_generate_command: uv run universe generate stellar-remnant-field --seed high-energy-remnants --out data/generated/stellar-remnant-field

name: Cosmic Web Map
description: Large-scale structure: filaments, voids, and galaxies as weak-lensing and dark-matter tracers.
teaching_summary: Weak lensing and galaxy distributions infer invisible mass structure.
scale_description: ~60 cMpc region with embedded cosmic web graph.
generate_command: uv run universe game generate-scene --scene cosmic-web-map
legacy_generate_command: uv run universe generate cosmic-web-map --seed invisible-architecture --out data/generated/cosmic-web-map

name: Now-Scope Anomaly Field
description: Speculative endgame field with fictional causality-independent anomalies.
teaching_summary: Fictional now-scope observation beyond light-cone constraints.
scale_description: Speculative schematic field — not real astrophysics.
generate_command: uv run universe game generate-scene --scene now-scope-anomaly-field
legacy_generate_command: uv run universe generate now-scope-anomaly-field --seed impossible-now --out data/generated/now-scope-anomaly-field
